video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 18 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: beautiful views awaited the riders at the end of stage 18 of the jira italia put a brute to get there to climb and a fight out the battle for the maldiarosa plenty of climbing along the way as they're headed to the valttelina and the dentro all the way over the passo de los stelvio his majesty the stelvio ready to dictate and be the judge julian may be executioner after 207 kilometers that's what awaited the riders 15 riders would get up the road and once they began the climb ben o'connor would be the strongest out of them the likes of dennis in the peloton behind looking after tailgate but it was somewhat going on the road and working up the road immediately putting the mayarosa in danger halfway down the climb joao almeida lost contact vincenzo nibbly as well and we very quickly had a group of two plus two two riders from the ineos grenadiers two from some web problem was the sun web leader was then dropped wilco kelderman very close to the top left behind hindley having to follow tayo gagan hart and rowan dennis putting in a man of the match performance to the top hindley had a hiccup or two as he struggled to get his coat on and a 25 kilometer descent in freezing temperatures awaited a gap of 46 seconds to keldaman the manaus are losing three and a half minutes at this point kelderman set to become the new race leader he couldn't get his coat on either though problems for the sunweb apparel and a cold descent for the two leaders from the german team to take on welcome cattlemen finished the descent with a 55 second gap but he soon started to lose more time ryan dennis did his job finished it brilliantly having pulled 141 out on kelderman by the time they finished that descent and started the final climb to laggy kettleman took a while to get his rhythm bilbao was finding himself better and better he was chasing on a minute from gagan hart and hindley were the leaders at this point gage not taking three bonus seconds on the way in hindley won but it was hinley who would come around him after sitting on for a long time winning the stage and going just ahead of gagan heart the countdown was under the malayalam 45 seconds it would be to bilbao and if kildaman was to pull on the pink jersey he'd need to come in two and a half minutes down 218 there and kelderman pulling on the mallardoza leading ahead of his teammate and tailgate but only just the biggest win of jai hindley's career just ahead of tale gagan heart who's now in the fight for pink with three stages to go joao made a losing 451 on the date and also losing the maliarosa a fortnight in charge the koenig quick step there a real ride from a man who fought tooth and nail to keep it no big collapse from almeida but he certainly lost them kelderman now has it the question is though can he keep it wilco calderman with just 12 seconds of a gap on jaya hindley at 15 seconds it's tailgate bilbao isn't far off the podium and almeida is now down from first to fifth paul sang having a good day ahead of comrad nibali maznada and pansteiner the top 10 now separated by 7 23. a flat stage for the riders from mourinho all the way down and onto the planes a last chance for the sprinters before milan and a stage finishing in asti before the day after they then go to cestria for an altered stage and three ascents though on stage 19 it is the longest day on this jira d'italia at kilometers you
